title: Grilled Navel Orange and Croatian Cheese Skewers
description: A refreshing summer recipe featuring the sweetness of navel oranges and the tanginess of Croatian cheese, all grilled to perfection.
instructions: Thread a navel orange wedge and a piece of Croatian cheese onto each skewer.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until the cheese is melted and the oranges are slightly charred.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
